hero.title: A city of learning. A society of care.
hero.lead: AOS Agra brings orthopaedic surgeons, teachers, trainees, and the community together through education, ethics, and service.

photoStory.title: The society is carried by people in rooms together.
photoStory.copy: Meetings, teaching sessions, and shared responsibility give AOS its real texture — collegial, academic, and local.
